dashboard.overviewDesc: Here is an overview of your active projects and client interactions.

project.title: Projects
project.description: Manage facade designs and client presentations.
project.searchProjects: Search projects by name or client...
project.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this project? This will permanently delete the project and all its uploaded files.

presentation.materialsDesc: Premium finishes curated for this project.
presentation.transformationDesc: Slide to compare the existing structure with the proposed facade.
presentation.proposedDesc: Additional high-quality renders and design angles.
presentation.interactiveDesc: Explore the facade details from every angle.
presentation.addComment: Add your comments or questions about the design here...
presentation.siteDesc: Current state of the structure prior to any interventions.
presentation.expiredDesc: This presentation link is no longer active.

materials.title: Materials Library
materials.description: Manage all global finishes and materials available for projects.
materials.searchMaterials: Search materials by name or color...

clients.title: Clients
clients.description: Manage your clients and their contact information.
clients.addClientDesc: Enter the client's details. They can be assigned to projects later.

gallery.title: Our Work
gallery.description: Explore our portfolio of completed facade presentations and engineering excellence.
gallery.noPhotos: No photos found in the gallery.

manageGallery.title: Manage Gallery
manageGallery.description: Upload standalone photos to your public gallery.
manageGallery.uploadDesc: Photos uploaded here will appear in the "Photo Gallery" tab of the public gallery page.
manageGallery.selectImages: Select Images (Select multiple for an album)
manageGallery.existingAlbumsDesc: Manage your previously uploaded photo albums.

projectDetails.updateCoreDetails: Update the core details of this project.
projectDetails.uploadImagesFirst: Upload images in the Visuals tab first to choose a Hero Image.
projectDetails.clientAccessDesc: Manage the secure public link for this project.
projectDetails.noDescription: No description provided for this project yet. Add a scope of work to help the team understand the architectural goals.
projectDetails.siteMeasurementsDesc: Log precise site dimensions and upload CAD files.
projectDetails.designIterationsDesc: Upload your 3D `.glb` models to sync with the Client Presentation.
projectDetails.uploadGlbPrompt: Upload a GLB file to bring this project to life.
projectDetails.uploadModelVisuals: Please upload a 3D model in the Designs tab to configure the visuals.
projectDetails.currentState: The current state of the building.
projectDetails.clickUploadSitePhoto: Click to choose or upload Site Photo
projectDetails.chooseExisting: Choose an existing photo from this project or upload a new one.
projectDetails.highQualityRender: High-quality render of the proposed facade.
projectDetails.clickUploadRender: Click to choose or upload Final Render
projectDetails.chooseExistingRender: Choose an existing render from this project or upload a new one.
projectDetails.uploadModelCommercials: Please upload a 3D model in the Designs tab to configure the commercials.
projectDetails.commercialDetailsDesc: Pricing and timeline estimates shown to the client.
projectDetails.uploadModelMaterials: Please upload a 3D model in the Designs tab to manage materials.
projectDetails.materialsUsedDesc: View the textures and materials assigned to this project.
projectDetails.assignMaterialsDesc: Select materials from the global library to assign them to this project.
projectDetails.noMaterialsAssigned: No materials assigned to this project yet.
projectDetails.removeMaterialConfirm: Remove this material from the project?
